languages.original_text: "Rest in peace, all those who fell defending the word of the Omnissiah to the last spark, even though the enemy was innumerable. Only the brightest mind can see the depth of the truth, that the Omnissiah knows all and learns all."

languages.text: "Омниссия, сохрани тех, кто пал, до последней искры защищая слово Его, даже если враг его был бессчетен. Лишь самый светлый разум способен узреть глубину истины, что Омниссия знает все и постигает все".

"Omnissiah preserve all those who fell defending His word to the last spark, though the enemy was innumerable. Only the brightest mind can see the depth of the truth, that the Omnissiah knows all, comprehends all."
languages.original_text: "Омниссия, сохрани тех, кто пал, до последней искры защищая слово Его, даже если враг его был бессчетен. Лишь самый светлый разум способен узреть глубину истины, что Омниссия знает все и постигает все".

languages.text: 「敵が数えきれないほどいたにもかかわらず、オムニシアの教えを守るために命を落としたすべての人々よ、安らかに眠れ。真実の深さを理解できるのは、最も優れた知性のみである。オムニシアはすべてを知り、すべてを学ぶ。」
languages.original_text: "Rest in peace, all those who fell defending the word of the Omnissiah to the last spark, even though the enemy was innumerable. Only the brightest mind can see the depth of the truth, that the Omnissiah knows all and learns all."

traits.locale_text: 「敵が数えきれないほどいたにもかかわらず、オムニシアの教えを守るために命を落としたすべての人々よ、安らかに眠れ。真実の深さを理解できるのは、最も優れた知性のみである。オムニシアはすべてを知り、すべてを学ぶ。」

languages.text: « Reposez en paix, vous tous qui êtes tombés en défendant la parole de l'Omnimessie jusqu'à la dernière étincelle, face à un ennemi innombrable. Seuls les esprits les plus brillants peuvent voir la profondeur de la vérité, que l'Omnimessie sait tout et apprend tout. »
languages.original_text: "Rest in peace, all those who fell defending the word of the Omnissiah to the last spark, even though the enemy was innumerable. Only the brightest mind can see the depth of the truth, that the Omnissiah knows all and learns all."

traits.locale_text: « Reposez en paix, vous tous qui êtes tombés en défendant la parole de l'Omnimessie jusqu'à la dernière étincelle, face à un ennemi innombrable. Seuls les esprits les plus brillants peuvent voir la profondeur de la vérité, que l'Omnimessie sait tout et apprend tout. »

languages.text: "Mögen all jene in Frieden ruhen, die das Wort des Omnissiah bis zum letzten Funken verteidigten, obwohl der Feind unzählbar war. Nur ein strahlender Verstand vermag die Tiefe der Wahrheit zu erkennen, wonach der Omnissiah alles weiß und erfährt."
languages.original_text: "Rest in peace, all those who fell defending the word of the Omnissiah to the last spark, even though the enemy was innumerable. Only the brightest mind can see the depth of the truth, that the Omnissiah knows all and learns all."

traits.locale_text: "Mögen all jene in Frieden ruhen, die das Wort des Omnissiah bis zum letzten Funken verteidigten, obwohl der Feind unzählbar war. Nur ein strahlender Verstand vermag die Tiefe der Wahrheit zu erkennen, wonach der Omnissiah alles weiß und erfährt."

languages.text: "Düşman sayısız olsa da Hermesih'in kelamını son kıvılcıma kadar savunurken düşenlerin hepsi huzur içinde yatsın. Yalnızca en parlak zihin; hakikatin derinliğini, Hermesih'in her şeyi bildiğini ve her şeyi öğrendiğini görebilir."
languages.original_text: "Rest in peace, all those who fell defending the word of the Omnissiah to the last spark, even though the enemy was innumerable. Only the brightest mind can see the depth of the truth, that the Omnissiah knows all and learns all."

traits.locale_text: "Düşman sayısız olsa da Hermesih'in kelamını son kıvılcıma kadar savunurken düşenlerin hepsi huzur içinde yatsın. Yalnızca en parlak zihin; hakikatin derinliğini, Hermesih'in her şeyi bildiğini ve her şeyi öğrendiğini görebilir."

languages.text: «Descansen en paz cuantos cayeron defendiendo la palabra del Omnissiah hasta la última chispa pese a los innumerables enemigos. Solo las mentes más brillantes pueden apercibirse de la profunda verdad: que el Omnissiah todo lo sabe y todo lo discierne».
languages.original_text: "Rest in peace, all those who fell defending the word of the Omnissiah to the last spark, even though the enemy was innumerable. Only the brightest mind can see the depth of the truth, that the Omnissiah knows all and learns all."

traits.locale_text: «Descansen en paz cuantos cayeron defendiendo la palabra del Omnissiah hasta la última chispa pese a los innumerables enemigos. Solo las mentes más brillantes pueden apercibirse de la profunda verdad: que el Omnissiah todo lo sabe y todo lo discierne».

languages.text: “安息吧，所有为捍卫欧姆尼赛亚的圣言而战至最后一息的英魂——即便他们面对着无穷无尽的敌人。唯有最聪慧的头脑方能窥见真理的深邃：欧姆尼赛亚洞悉一切、参透一切。”
languages.original_text: "Rest in peace, all those who fell defending the word of the Omnissiah to the last spark, even though the enemy was innumerable. Only the brightest mind can see the depth of the truth, that the Omnissiah knows all and learns all."

traits.locale_text: “安息吧，所有为捍卫欧姆尼赛亚的圣言而战至最后一息的英魂——即便他们面对着无穷无尽的敌人。唯有最聪慧的头脑方能窥见真理的深邃：欧姆尼赛亚洞悉一切、参透一切。”
